name: TestILDisturbChecksum
title: TestILDisturbChecksum
syntax: long TestILDisturbChecksum(dbMessage aMsg, long checksumType, long disturbanceMode, long disturbanceCount, long disturbanceValue);
description: Modifies the checksum. Different fault injections are possible.
This function influences a simulation node with an assigned CANoe Interaction Layer.

parameters.name: aMsg
parameters.description: Name of the message that should be modified.
